use_case: 18 business case study simulations for Lo! Foods brand strategy research across sub-brands, channels, pricing, and consumer segments in Indian health food market.
notes: Real brand name used throughout. Interventions emerge dynamically from probing phase — not pre-set. All personas are India-grounded with Sarvam cultural layer enabled. B2B professional personas (P1-P4) run full 8-phase simulation including personal health beliefs.

target_segments.name: Hospital Dietitian / Clinical Nutritionist
target_segments.role: institutional food decision-maker and clinical patient advisor
target_segments.notes: Full 8-phase simulation including personal health beliefs — dietitians have their own dietary philosophies which influence recommendations. Skeptical of marketing claims without clinical evidence (FSSAI, peer-reviewed studies). Key gatekeeper for DiabeSmart hospital channel. Will not recommend without FSSAI + ideally clinical study backing.
